hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams cut operational costs by unifying fragmented provider outputs into one audit-ready workflow that minimizes repeated checks and manual handoffs.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance reviews slow under duplicated checks
problem_description: Fragmented provider outputs force compliance teams to re-run overlapping reviews across KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule workflows. This duplication increases manual workload, weakens auditability and slows onboarding and case resolution in digital asset operations.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule results into a unified compliance workflow that reduces duplicated reviews, preserves audit evidence and accelerates onboarding and case resolution.
workflow_title: From provider results to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY organizes fragmented provider outputs through rules, risk reviews, case workflows, decision recording and evidence preservation for consistent compliance control.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond duplicated reviews. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into structured workflows, cases and evidence to reduce duplicated reviews and improve audit readiness across compliance operations.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing review duplication by unifying provider outputs, preserving audit evidence, and enabling scalable compliance through controlled enterprise deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY help reduce duplicated compliance reviews
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case workflows support duplicate review management
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence preserves review history and decisions
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how provider orchestration minimizes repeated onboarding checks
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY reduce duplicated compliance reviews?
faq_1_answer: SFTY consolidates fragmented provider outputs into connected workflows, reducing manual rechecks and duplicated reviews across onboarding, KYT, Travel Rule and case management processes for VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure workflows across providers?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects multiple compliance provider data streams into one operational layer, applying internal rules, routing reviews and opening cases for consistent and auditable decision-making workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready compliance evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY captures decision logs, case history and supporting evidence to provide audit-ready records that demonstrate why compliance decisions were made and by whom.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY is provider-neutral and integrates with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening and reporting systems, layering workflows without requiring tool replacement.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing providers and does not replace them but turns their outputs into structured compliance cases, evidence and reports.
final_title: Reduce duplicate reviews with connected compliance workflows
final_description: See how SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into one controlled audit-ready workflow to minimize manual reviews and duplicated effort.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
